info.name: Wstrzykiwacz kodu
Code Injector
info.summary: Wstrzyknij własny kod HTML do każdej strony
Inject custom HTML into every page head or body
info.description:
Allows administrators to inject arbitrary HTML code into the `<head>` or `<body>` of every Nextcloud page.
Example use cases: - Analytics and tracking snippets - Tag management containers - Customizations (e.g. styles)
info.author: Paweł Zawiślak
